Localization.Description: Request a TGT ticket using a certificate or smart card. Attackers can use the received TGT ticket to obtain the NTLM hash of the account. Using this data may allow an attacker to carry out a Pass-The-Hash or Silver Ticket attack

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} requested a TGT using a certificate or smart card issued by "{datafield7}" on host {event_src.host}
